conflict: The recording implicates Kwon in a past staged incident and implicates Eun-sook in silence.
consequence: Ina commits to a controlled archive leak, shifting from inherited loyalty to accountable truth.
must_land_beats: Storage locker search retrieves the cassette and supporting notes.
Tape details a staged border clash with civilian deaths.
Ina's moral image of her mother is destabilized.
Leak strategy is defined with phased release and civilian redactions.
objective: Interpret Eun-sook's cassette to determine whether leak action is justified.
